lastItems.title: What Parameter Golf taught us about AI-assisted research
lastItems.summary: Parameter Golf brought together 1,000+ participants and 2,000+ submissions to explore AI-assisted machine learning research, coding agents, quantization, and novel model design under strict constraints.
